category_sources: source_facts.description says it indents and reformats Perl scripts; official perltidy documentation describes Perl::Tidy as parsing and beautifying Perl source.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is perltidy; official homepage and documentation use perltidy and Perl::Tidy.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge perltidy site hosts the perltidy homepage and Perl::Tidy manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official perltidy manual states the source code repository is https://github.com/perltidy/perltidy.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Perl script reformatting; source_facts.executables includes perltidy; official docs describe parsing and beautifying Perl source.
